title: Add notification_service unit tests
description: Add unit tests for NotificationService.send_notification, get_user_notifications, mark_as_read, and get_unread_count in tests/unit/test_notification_service.py. Test send_notification returns success with non-None notification_id, get_user_notifications returns list, mark_as_read toggles unread flag, and get_unread_count returns integer >= 0.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_notification_service.py --collect-only shows >=4 test items; pytest tests/unit/test_notification_service.py -v passes all; assert isinstance(result.data['notifications'], list) passes for get_user_notifications
